## Description
<!-- Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. -->

## Contributor Role
- [ ] Repo Owner / Collaborator
- [ ] External Contributor

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] New Skill or Repository Integration
- [ ] Promotion (`staging` → `main`)

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have checked that my new skill/functionality does not duplicate existing ones
- [ ] I have verified there are **no hardcoded absolute paths** (`/home/...`) in my skills or scripts
- [ ] I have tested my bash scripts with `bash -n script_name`
- [ ] **I have read and agree to the [Contributor License Agreement (CLA)](../CLA.md) / [Accordo di Licenza per i Contributori (CLA.it.md)](../CLA.it.md)**
